subject: Flights..
body:
Air France has business class only available tonight. One flight at 9pm with only 2 classes of service offered.
This link shows the layout of the Air France plane: 
http://www.seatguru.com/airlines/Air_France/Air_France_Airbus_A330.php

There is a flight at 11pm with 3 classes of service, but only business is available. This is the layout of that plane:
http://www.seatguru.com/airlines/Air_France/Air_France_Boeing_777-300.php

This link shows the what the seats look like in Business class
http://www.airfrance.us/US/en/common/guidevoyageur/classeetconfort/affaires_confort.htm?BV_SessionID=@@@@1951972963.1200764187@@@@&BV_EngineID=cccjaddmlmfhlekcefecekedgfndghk.0

Air France has First class seats tomorrow. They have currently 2 seats in first at 4:55pm(as well as business) and 3 seats in first at 7:15pm(as well as business) The guy said they can go very fast, so if we want them, we should book them ASAP. 

Please advise..
